description: CompositionBlack sleeveless top made of 100% cotton, has a wide round neck, half button placket, lace detail around the neckline and ruffles at arm openingsFitRegularWash careHand wash cold using mild detergentWash dark colours seperatelyDo not bleach, iron or scrub on embroidery & printDo not wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild ironThis super soft pepper black top with pretty lace detailing around the neckline, is the season's summer essential. lee can be relied upon to offer us something special, and they don't disappoint with this cute top. Style this with form fitting jeggings and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
